creator: jaap@NLnetLabs.nl
text:
Created attachment 253105
patch to upgrade

Version 2.1.14 of OpenDNSSEC has been released on 2024-08-22

This is a maintenance release that fixes some bugs and adds robustness
for HSM outages. Apart from a minor fix to the backup keys command and
export keys, it solved an issue where keys were not published soon enough
in special cases in combination with the <SharedKeys> directive. In case you
use shared keys, you have to update. But this is a good idea anyway.
